text: What if helping others is a strategy for survival? Welcome to reciprocal altruism, where generosity boosts survival. Imagine this: you help me, I help you. It’s a win-win. Studies show animals engage in this too, like vampire bats sharing food. But, it’s not all perfect. Uncertainty exists in trust. Curious about how this affects us? Hit like for more science insights!
